raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California's cost-of-living crisis was caused by regulations and high taxes.",
    "The proposed law would provide each middle-class family with $2,500 in cost-of-living relief rebates annually.",
    "The measure limits the ability of politicians to raise taxes and prohibits new Mileage, Exit, or Wealth Taxes.",
    "The Balanced Budget Accountability Act would require a two-thirds vote of both houses of the Legislature to pass the budget or impose or increase taxes or fees.",
    "The proposed Education Choice and Parental Empowerment Act would provide $13,000 annually in education vouchers for every student.",
    "The proposed law would replace the 'Housing First' homeless model with a 'People First' model, which focuses on mental health and substance abuse treatment.",
    "The End Reckless Release of Criminals Act would prohibit the early release of violent criminal and repeat offenders.",
    "The California Secure Borders Act would repeal the Sanctuary State law and end taxpayer-funded handouts to illegal immigrants.",
    "The proposed Voter ID and Election Integrity Act requires a government-issued ID to vote starting with the 2026 election.",
    "The Punish Unconstitutional Actions Act would penalize legislators for passing unconstitutional laws with a 25% cut in annual state compensation.",
    "The Cut the Politicians’ Perks Act would ban politicians from accepting gifts and eliminate pensions for local elected officials."
  ]
}
```
